title: Add ather mini to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [ather mini](minitejas.in) to chat
- ather mini provides a ChatGPT-like AI chat to help people learn about AI and uses pollinations.ai for teaching.

Fixes #10354

gist.headline: Ather Mini joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Ather Mini just sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a ChatGPT-like interface built to help people learn about AI, powered by Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added Ather Mini, a ChatGPT-like educational chat interface that uses Pollinations.ai to teach people about AI, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Ather Mini in the apps directory and see how Pollinations can be used to build educational AI tools.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy digital greenhouse setting. The Pollinations bee (Polly) acting as a teacher, showing a small retro computer terminal (representing Ather Mini's chat interface) to the Monitor Robot. Lots of green plants, code-plants, and lime green accents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a lush digital greenhouse where the cute bee mascot, wearing tiny teacher glasses, shows a chat interface on a retro computer monitor to a chunky little robot. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around them. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a lush digital greenhouse where the cute bee mascot, wearing tiny teacher glasses, shows a chat interface on a retro computer monitor to a chunky little robot.
